title: stelis scabrata
intro: Stelis scabrata, also known as the rough stelis, is a type of flowering orchid native to Mexico and Central America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Stelis scabrata include its potential to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a valuable resource in folk medicine. Herbal preparations of Stelis scabrata often involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves and flowers, which can be used to create teas, tinctures, or topical applications for various health conditions.
